disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Chest tightness and a crushing chest sensation with breathlessness, came on over hours before a dreaded social event
trigger_question_examples: Can you describe the chest feeling?
When did the chest tightness start and what were you doing?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My chest feels tight and crushing and I can't get a full breath. It built up over a few hours before a social thing I was dreading.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Rapid breathing, pounding heart, trembling and an overwhelming sense of impending doom sustained for about 5 hours
trigger_question_examples: How has your breathing and heart been?
How long has this been going on?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My heart is pounding, I'm breathing really fast and shaking, and I've felt like something terrible is about to happen for about five hours now.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: The patient states he does not want to wake up looking like this — a passive wish not to be alive, in the setting of acute distress
trigger_question_examples: Sometimes when people feel this overwhelmed they have thoughts that life isn't worth living — have you had any thoughts like that?
Have you had any thoughts of harming yourself or not wanting to be here?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: ...I don't want to wake up looking like this. I can't keep being like this.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: I don't really want to talk about that.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Stopped his prescribed testosterone gel abruptly about 3 weeks ago out of frustration that it was not changing his body quickly enough
trigger_question_examples: Are you taking any regular medicines, and have any changed recently?
Have you stopped or missed any of your usual treatment?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I stopped using my testosterone gel about three weeks ago. I got fed up because it wasn't changing anything fast enough.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Distress is centred on his appearance — his height and body proportions, lack of body/facial hair, and worsening breast tissue — and on being around other people
trigger_question_examples: What is it about today that feels so unbearable?
Can you tell me what's been weighing on you the most?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I hate how I look — I'm too tall, I've got no hair, and this chest tissue keeps getting worse. I can't stand people seeing me.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: It doesn't matter, you wouldn't understand.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Generalised weakness and low energy over recent weeks
trigger_question_examples: How has your energy and strength been lately?
Have you been feeling weaker or more tired than usual?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've felt weak and drained the last few weeks, like I've got no strength.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No hallucinations, no delusions — the distress is based on his real appearance, catastrophised, not on false beliefs or perceptions
trigger_question_examples: Have you seen or heard anything that others can't?
Any thoughts that feel unusual or that others are against you?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I'm not seeing or hearing things. I just can't stand how I actually look.
